APPROVE
axon.query (cypher+parameters) and per-named-query tools generated from schema.queries; descriptions surface schema doc; both delegate to shared axon-graphql dynamic helpers preserving policy/limits/timeout. Wired into stdio and HTTP MCP. New tests cover happy-path and error cases.
